en: I charge you in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who is to judge the living and the dead, and by his appearing and his kingdom:
zh: 我在 神面前，並且在那將要審判活人死人的基督耶穌面前，憑著他的顯現和國度叮囑你：

en: preach the word; be ready in season and out of season; reprove, rebuke, and exhort, with complete patience and teaching.
zh: 務要傳道；無論時機是否適合，都要常作準備；要以多方的忍耐和教訓責備人、警戒人、勸勉人。

en: For the time is coming when people will not endure sound teaching, but having itching ears they will accumulate for themselves teachers to suit their own passions,
zh: 因為時候快要到了，人必容不下純正的道理，反而耳朵發癢，隨著自己的私慾，增添許多教師，

en: and will turn away from listening to the truth and wander off into myths.
zh: 而且轉離不聽真理，反倒趨向無稽之談。

en: As for you, always be sober-minded, endure suffering, do the work of an evangelist, fulfill your ministry.
zh: 你卻要凡事謹慎，忍受磨難、作傳福音者的工作，完成你的職務。

en: For I am already being poured out as a drink offering, and the time of my departure has come.
zh: 我已經被澆奠；我離世的時候也到了。

en: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.
zh: 那美好的仗我已經打過了，當跑的路我已經跑盡了，所持的信仰我已經守住了。

en: Henceforth there is laid up for me the crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous judge, will award to me on that Day, and not only to me but also to all who have loved his appearing.
zh: 從此以後，有公義的冠冕為我存留，就是按公義審判的主在那日要賞給我的；不但賞給我，也賞給所有愛慕他顯現的人。

en: Do your best to come to me soon.
zh: 你要盡快到我這裡來。

en: For Demas, in love with this present world, has deserted me and gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, Titus to Dalmatia.
zh: 因為底馬貪愛現今的世界，就離棄我到帖撒羅尼迦去了。革勒士去了加拉太，提多去了達馬太。

en: Luke alone is with me. Get Mark and bring him with you, for he is very useful to me for ministry.
zh: 只有路加在我這裡。你找到了馬可，就把他帶來，因為他在聖工上對我有益。

en: Tychicus I have sent to Ephesus.
zh: 我差派了推基古到以弗所去。

en: When you come, bring the cloak that I left with Carpus at Troas, also the books, and above all the parchments.
zh: 我在特羅亞留在加布那裡的外衣，你來的時候要把它帶來，還有那些書卷，特別是那些羊皮卷，也要帶來。

en: Alexander the coppersmith did me great harm; the Lord will repay him according to his deeds.
zh: 銅匠亞歷山大作了許多惡事陷害我，主必按著他所行的報應他。

en: Beware of him yourself, for he strongly opposed our message.
zh: 你也要提防他，因為他極力抵擋我們的話。

en: At my first defense no one came to stand by me, but all deserted me. May it not be charged against them!
zh: 我第一次申辯的時候，沒有一個人支持我，反而離棄我。但願這罪不要歸在他們身上。

en: But the Lord stood by me and strengthened me, so that through me the message might be fully proclaimed and all the Gentiles might hear it. So I was rescued from the lion's mouth.
zh: 然而主站在我旁邊，加給我力量，使福音的信息藉著我盡都傳開，萬國的人都可以聽見；他並且把我從獅子口中救出來。

en: The Lord will rescue me from every evil deed and bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. To him be the glory forever and ever. Amen.
zh: 主必救我脫離一切邪惡的事，也必救我進入他天上的國。願榮耀歸給他，直到永永遠遠。阿們。

en: Greet Prisca and Aquila, and the household of Onesiphorus.
zh: 問候百基拉、亞居拉和阿尼色弗一家的人。

en: Erastus remained at Corinth, and I left Trophimus, who was ill, at Miletus.
zh: 以拉都在哥林多住下了。特羅非摩病了，我就留他在米利都。

en: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus sends greetings to you, as do Pudens and Linus and Claudia and all the brothers.
zh: 你要趕緊在冬天以前到我這裡來。友布羅、布田、利奴、革老底亞和眾弟兄都問候你。

en: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you.
zh: 主與你同在。願恩惠與你們同在。
